n = int(input())
s = input()

# Initialize the count to the length of the string
count = n

# Iterate through the string
for i in range(n):
    # Check if the current character is the same as the next character
    if i < n-1 and s[i] == s[i+1]:
        # If it is, increment the count
        count += 1

# Print the count
print(count)
